name: 19th Hole Indoor Golf Bar
about: The 19th Hole Indoor Golf Bar is an indoor golf facility equipped with three Full Swing Pro Series Simulators. The venue offers a year-round climate-controlled environment at 70 degrees with a bar atmosphere that includes couches, high-top tables, and poker tables. It is located adjacent to the Blind Squirrel restaurant and serves a full bar with food options available on-site. The facility caters to golfers looking to play on famous PGA courses, practice, or host social events. In the future, the venue plans to add PGA instruction, club services, and expand its offerings to include junior programs and leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to world-class PGA courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews year-round
Climate-controlled environment always set to 70 degrees and sunny
Full bar and food service available from Blind Squirrel restaurant
Multisport simulator package with over 30 games including baseball and soccer
Nintendo Wii integration for games like Mario Kart and Bowling

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu from Blind Squirrel restaurant including wings, gourmet burgers, salads, wraps, pizza, and appetizers
Full service bar with buckets of beer, wine, seltzers, mixed drinks, soda, sports drinks, and water

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available. It's recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly for more information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue has a full service bar and food available from the Blind Squirrel restaurant on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify the exact time for 18 holes, but playing on a simulator typically takes 1.5-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and plans to offer junior instruction in the future. It also has a multisport package with games suitable for children.
